name: Coconut Choco Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. Melt the baking chocolate and margarine over low heat, stirring until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and salt. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Add eggs to the cream cheese mixture one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Blend in the melted chocolate mixture and flaked coconut into the cream cheese mixture. Pour over the crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 55 to 60 minutes, or until set.
8. Combine the sour cream, sugar, and brandy. Spread over the cheesecake.
9. Bake at 300 degrees F. for 5 minutes.
10. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
